title: tephrosia sabulosa
intro: Tephrosia sabulosa is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Tephrosia sabulosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
